caption: The video features an elderly man with white hair tied back, wearing glasses and a blue shirt adorned with eagle patterns. He is seated in front of a microphone, suggesting he is giving a speech or presentation. The background consists of wooden blinds, indicating an indoor setting, possibly a conference room or lecture hall. The man appears to be speaking earnestly, as his facial expressions and mouth movements convey a sense of engagement and seriousness. The logo "ORCA" is visible in the bottom right corner, hinting that the event may be related to this organization. The overall atmosphere suggests a formal or educational context.
